player.description: Fire dragon top-down view, wings spread, molten lava orange and crimson scales, golden belly, heroic warrior dragon

enemy.description: Magma golem enemy top-down view, dark volcanic rock body with glowing lava cracks, red eyes

boss.description: Obsidian demon boss top-down view, enormous dark crystal wings with magma veins, three red eyes, volcanic glass horns

ember.description: Glowing ember crystal collectible, fiery orange-red crystalline gem with inner fire glow

crystal.description: Blue energy crystal power-up, glowing blue sapphire with electric energy

token.description: Dragon Forge Token DFT coin icon, golden with dragon silhouette

playerBullet.description: Dragon fire breath projectile, vertical flame bolt, bright orange-yellow core with red flame edges

enemyBullet.description: Dark magma projectile orb, molten lava sphere with black obsidian crust, glowing red

space.description: Deep volcanic eruption background, rivers of molten lava through dark rock, crimson sky, ember particles
